articles.title: Ethereum Is About To “Explode” Because Of This Key Technical Indicator: Analyst
articles.description: Tony “The Bull,” a technical analyst and the Editorial Executive at NewsBTC, now thinks Ethereum (ETH), the second most valuable cryptocurrency, is about to explode. “The Bull” cites technical candlestick formation in the ETHUSDT daily chart as a leading indicator for ETH, a coin now trading above $3,000, the highest level over two years. articles.title: When Will BlackRock File For An XRP ETF? Expert Has Answers
articles.description: A crypto analyst has revealed a timeline for BlackRock, an American multinational investment company, to potentially announce its launch of an XRP Exchange Traded Fund (ETF). The analyst has highlighted key factors that could contribute to the approval of an XRP ETF, including the official resolution of Ripple’s ongoing battle with the United States Securities […]

articles.title: MicroStrategy Expands Bitcoin Treasury: Purchases 3,000 BTC, Total Holdings Reach 193,000
articles.description: Despite reports of a hack on the X (formerly Twitter) social media account of MicroStrategy, a well-known enterprise software company headquartered in Tysons Corner, Virginia, the firm has once again increased its Bitcoin (BTC) holdings by purchasing an additional 3,000 BTC this month. According to Bloomberg, the total value of this purchase amounts to $155.4 […]

articles.title: Hedera teams up with Pyth Network to unlock over 400 real-time data feeds for DeFi developers
articles.description: The HBAR Foundation, an organization dedicated to supporting the growth and development of Hedera's ecosystem, announced today its partnership with the Pyth Network to integrate Pyth Price Feeds into the Hedera Network. With this move, Hedera aims to enable DeFi builders to easily access over 400 real-time price feeds across crypto, foreign exchange, commodities, equities, and exchange-traded...

articles.title: Cryptocurrency VeChain's Price Increased More Than 11% Within 24 hours
articles.description: VeChain's (CRYPTO: VET) price has increased 11.96% over the past 24 hours to $0.05. Over the past week, VET has experienced an uptick of over 10.0%, moving from $0.05 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $0.28. read more
